children.text: provide any other services to the Secretary to administer this subchapter.

children.heading: .—Treatment of Costs
children.label: b .—Treatment of Costs
children.text: The costs of such agreements shall be considered, for purposes of the special account established under section 4982(c), to be costs of administrative expenses of the Department of Defense that are attributable to the loan guarantee program under this subchapter.
